name: Saltpetre
rationale: Spade-dug deposit used to make fertiliser (Farming); not pickaxe-mined. Dropped Mining + Smithing.

name: Anglerfish
rationale: Cooked food healing up to 22 (overheal); high-heal combat food rule. Fixed Melee,Slayer.

name: Ensouled horror head
rationale: Reanimation (Magic) -> Prayer XP; harmonized with ensouled-head family. Dropped Slayer, added Mage.
comments: Ensouled heads are prayer training only, despite giving mage XP they are a prayer input. This same logic would put any item than can be alchamized in the magic tab and we can't have that!

name: Book of arcane knowledge
rationale: Arceuus Library reward XP book (choice of Magic or Runecraft); generic XP-grant like a lamp -> Misc.

name: Transvergence theory
rationale: Arceuus Library fetch-and-return book; Runecraft tag spurious (no Runecraft I/O).

name: Shayzien supply gloves (1)
rationale: JUDGMENT: unequippable armour smithed from lovakite bars = Smithing output -> Mining + Smithing.

name: Dynamite
rationale: Blast Mining explosive; Firemaking XP from lighting is incidental to the mining use. Dropped Woodcutting + Firemaking.

name: Graceful hood (Arceuus)
rationale: Graceful region recolour: keeps Agility weight-reduction + is a cosmetic re-skin. (Applies to ALL ~40 region/Kourend/Agility-Arena graceful recolours.)

name: Seed box
rationale: Dedicated Tithe Farm seed-storage tool -> Farming. Dropped Misc.

name: Clue bottle (medium)
rationale: Clue-scroll container; Fishing is only the drop source -> Misc. (Same for clue nests/geodes - drop WC/Mining.)

name: Teleport card
rationale: Charges the Chronicle teleport book -> Teleports (teleport-charge item).

name: Chronicle
rationale: Equipable teleport book (Champions' Guild teleport) -> Teleports.

name: Bag full of gems
rationale: Bundle of 40 uncut gems (Crafting material); mining-shop purchase is acquisition, not a Mining I/O. Dropped Mining + Smithing.

name: Achievement diary cape
rationale: Diary-completion prestige cape (Cosmetics) + all-diary-master/bank teleports (Teleports). Dropped Misc/Quests.

name: Light ballista
rationale: Ranged 2h crossbow (65 Range); airship-wreckage drop, not player-fletched. Dropped Fletching.

name: Zenyte bracelet
rationale: Unenchanted jewellery -> Crafting; no magic stats until enchanted (becomes tormented bracelet). Dropped Mage.

name: Ring of suffering
rationale: All-around defensive ring (defence in all styles, like salve(i)) -> Melee + Range + Mage; +2 prayer incidental. Dropped Prayer.

name: Iron javelin tips
rationale: Harmonized javelin-tip family: smithed + fletched ammo precursor keeps Range (per bolt-tip precedent). Added Range.

name: Unstrung light ballista
rationale: Ballista BUILD intermediate (like unstrung crossbow) -> Fletching; dropped stray Range. (Same for frames/limbs/springs/monkey tail.)

name: Arceuus library teleport
rationale: Breakable teleport tablet -> Teleports. (Same for the ~11 house/spellbook teleport tablets in this batch.)

name: Soul bearer
rationale: Ensouled-head banking tool for Prayer training (like bonecrusher) -> Prayer. Dropped Misc.

name: Black slayer helmet (i)
rationale: Imbued recoloured slayer helm: (i) extends on-task bonus to all styles -> added Range + Mage. (Also green/red (i).)

name: Arclight
rationale: Demonbane melee sword; anti-demon bonus is a monster-type effect, not slayer-task-locked (like salve amulet). Dropped Slayer.

name: Ancient shard
rationale: Charges/creates Arclight (Melee weapon) + catacomb altar teleports. Dropped Misc/Slayer.

name: Jar of darkness
rationale: Boss-collectible jar (Skotizo) -> Misc (jar family, matches jar of dirt/souls/etc).

name: Amulet of eternal glory
rationale: Amulet-of-glory stats (all combat styles) + unlimited teleports -> Melee + Range + Mage + Teleports. Dropped Misc.

name: Ring of suffering (i)
rationale: Imbued all-around defensive ring (all styles) -> Melee + Range + Mage; +4 prayer incidental. Dropped Prayer.

name: Lucky impling jar
rationale: Hunter-caught impling jar (89 Hunter) -> Hunter (Hunter keeps its outputs). Dropped Misc.

name: Ancient d'hide boots
rationale: God-blessed d'hide ranged boots (prayer bonus + god theme) -> Cosmetics + Range + Prayer (matches batch-5 god d'hide ruling). Added Cosmetics. (All 6 god d'hide boots.)

name: Heavy casket
rationale: 200-elite-clue milestone reward, wieldable as a weapon (iron-warhammer stats) -> Cosmetics + Melee. Dropped Misc.

name: Dragon scimitar ornament kit
rationale: Standalone ornament KIT (no stats) -> Cosmetics only. Dropped Melee. (Contrast: the assembled (or) weapon keeps Melee.)

name: Samurai shirt
rationale: Master-clue decorative armour with real melee-style defence (35 Def) -> Cosmetics + Melee. Added Melee. (Whole samurai set.)

name: Arceuus banner
rationale: Wieldable house banner with real melee stats (+12) -> Cosmetics + Melee.

name: Saradomin godsword (or)
rationale: SGS special restores prayer (defining, per batch-5 SGS ruling) -> Cosmetics + Melee + Prayer. Added Prayer. (AGS/BGS/ZGS (or) stay Melee.)

name: Shark
rationale: LMS minigame-locked high-heal combat food (heals 20), not cookable variant -> Melee + Range + Mage. Dropped Misc.

name: Abyssal whip
rationale: LMS minigame-locked melee weapon -> Melee. Dropped Misc. (Pattern for all LMS weapons/armour: functional combat tab, drop Misc.)

name: Catalytic rune pack
rationale: LMS rune supply pack (catalytic runes for casting) -> Mage. Dropped Misc/Slayer.

name: Super energy(4)
rationale: LMS run-energy-restore potion (not brewable variant) -> Agility + Thieving (run energy). Dropped Misc.

name: Amulet of power
rationale: All-round amulet (+6 all attack styles) -> Melee + Range + Mage. Dropped Misc.

name: Ancient signet
rationale: POH ancient/occult altar build requirement; quest-locked-but-usable -> Construction. Dropped Quests.

name: Tangleroot
rationale: Farming skilling pet -> Cosmetics (pets drop the skill). Dropped Farming. (Same: rift guardian drops Runecraft.)

name: Bruma kindling
rationale: Fletched from bruma root (knife = Fletching output) + burned in braziers -> Fletching + WC+FM. Added Fletching.

name: Burnt page
rationale: Charges the tome of fire (a Mage item) -> Mage. Dropped WC+FM (Wintertodt drop source, not a Firemaking I/O).

name: Bruma torch
rationale: Wintertodt warm-clothing + tinderbox-replacement brazier lighter -> WC+FM. Dropped spurious Hunter.

name: Imbued heart
rationale: Magic-level-boost item (used anywhere) -> Mage; superior-slayer drop source is not a slayer-task lock. Dropped Slayer.

name: Empty jug pack
rationale: Pack of empty jugs (wine-making Cooking container) -> Cooking. Dropped Herblore (jugs aren't Herblore containers) + spurious Slayer.

name: Ardougne max cape
rationale: MAX-CAPE FAMILY [your call]: max cape (all-99 prestige -> Cosmetics) fused with Ardougne cloak 4 (diary teleports -> Teleports). Dropped Misc.

name: Ring of wealth (i5)
rationale: Imbued ring of wealth: 5 teleport charges (Teleports) + drop/clue effect (Misc). Added Teleports.

name: Kindling
rationale: CoX kindling chopped from saplings (WC) + burned (FM); dropped spurious Fletching (no knife/fletch step). CONTRAST bruma kindling (fletched, keeps Fletching).

name: Dragon thrownaxe
rationale: Ranged throwing weapon (61 Range); wyrm/drake/hydra drop is not a slayer-task lock. Dropped spurious Slayer.

name: Brawk fish (3)
rationale: Cooked CoX raid food heals 14 (>=12) -> Cooking + all combat styles (raid-locked, NO Slayer). (CoX fish/bats >=12 heal.)

name: Grimy noxifer
rationale: Herb harvested from a Farming patch (Farming output) + cleaned for potions (Herblore). Added Farming to match clean herb. (All CoX grimy herbs.)

name: Xeric's aid (1)
rationale: CoX defensive PvM potion (heals HP + boosts Defence), used in all combat styles like Saradomin brew -> Herblore + Melee + Range + Mage (raid-locked, no Slayer). Dropped Misc.

name: Overload (1)
rationale: CoX overload boosts ALL combat stats -> Herblore + Melee + Range + Mage. Added Range/Mage. (All overload doses.)

name: Medivaemia blossom
rationale: CoX Vespula-fight mechanic item (feeds lux grubs) -> Misc. Dropped spurious Quests.

name: Dragon hunter crossbow
rationale: Dragonbane crossbow (70 Range); anti-dragon bonus is a monster-type effect, not a slayer-task lock (like demonbane). Dropped Slayer.

name: Infernal harpoon
rationale: Auto-cooking fishing harpoon (Fishing + Cooking) + wieldable melee weapon -> Cooking + Fishing + Melee. Added Melee to match dragon harpoon.
comments: no one actuaqlly uses this to fight with, it's only good for fishing, pleawe put it in fishing only as that is the tool it is for. You can't cook with it, it just cooks automatiocally as a part of it's function.

name: Ancient tablet
rationale: Unlocks the Mount Quidamortem teleport on Xeric's talisman -> Teleports.

name: Torn prayer scroll
rationale: Consumable scroll unlocking the Preserve prayer -> Prayer. Dropped Quests (CoX drop, not a quest item).

name: Bandos godsword (quest decoration)
rationale: Unobtainable Misthalin Mystery decoration BGS (alch 0, useless) -> Misc (can't be obtained). Dropped Quests.

name: Graceful hood (Agility Arena)
rationale: Agility Arena graceful recolour (functional + cosmetic) -> Agility + Thieving + Cosmetics.

name: Clue scroll (master)
rationale: Master Treasure Trail clue -> Misc (spot-check; all clue scrolls Misc).

name: Twisted (+)(1)
rationale: Xeric's twisted combat potion (ranged boost) -> Herblore + Range (spot-check).

name: Twisted bow
rationale: CoX rare Ranged 2h bow (85 Range) -> Range (spot-check).
